question: When did Voyager 1 cross the heliopause and enter interstellar space?

messages.content: When did Voyager 1 cross the heliopause and enter interstellar space?

args.query: Voyager 1 heliopause interstellar space crossing date

content.title: NASA Announcement: Voyager 1 Enters Interstellar Space

messages.name: fetch_url
messages.content:
# NASA Announcement: Voyager 1 Enters Interstellar Space

NASA confirmed in September 2013 that Voyager 1 had crossed the heliopause in August 2012, becoming the first human-made object to enter interstellar space. The crossing occurred at approximately 121 AU from the Sun.

args.answer: Voyager 1 crossed the heliopause and entered interstellar space in **August 2012**, at approximately 121 AU from the Sun. NASA officially confirmed this milestone in September 2013, making Voyager 1 the first human-made object to leave the solar wind boundary.

final_answer: Voyager 1 crossed the heliopause and entered interstellar space in **August 2012**, at approximately 121 AU from the Sun. NASA officially confirmed this milestone in September 2013, making Voyager 1 the first human-made object to leave the solar wind boundary.
